items.title: Why Home Depot Is Sinking Today
items.author: Lou Whiteman
items.description: A key government measure of inflation came in hotter than expected in January, fueled in part by an uptick in housing costs. This could put a damper on housing sales and home improvements, impacting companies like Home Depot.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: Home Depot's business is closely tied to the housing and renovation markets, which are sensitive to interest rates. The hotter-than-expected inflation data raises doubts about rate cuts in 2025, which could negatively impact Home Depot's performance.
